channel.title: GitHub SCSS Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: vinceliuice/WhiteSur-gtk-theme
item.description: MacOS Big Sur like theme for Gnome desktops

item.title: cobidev/simplefolio
item.description: ⚡️ A minimal portfolio template for Developers

item.title: pmarsceill/just-the-docs
item.description: A modern, high customizable, responsive Jekyll theme for documention with built-in search.

item.title: compose-spec/compose-spec
item.description: The Compose specification

item.title: jekyll/minima
item.description: Minima is a one-size-fits-all Jekyll theme for writers.

item.title: migueravila/Bento
item.description: 🍱 Minimalist, elegant and simple startpage inspired by the Bento box!

item.title: 2factorauth/twofactorauth
item.description: List of sites with two factor auth support which includes SMS, email, phone calls, hardware, and software.

item.title: bedimcode/responsive-portfolio-website-JhonDoe
item.description: Responsive Portfolio Website Using HTML CSS JS

item.title: prakhar1989/docker-curriculum
item.description: 🐬 A comprehensive tutorial on getting started with Docker!

item.title: flutter/website
item.description: Flutter web site

item.title: slatedocs/slate
item.description: Beautiful static documentation for your API

item.title: conventional-commits/conventionalcommits.org
item.description: The conventional commits specification

item.title: ubuntu/yaru
item.description: Ubuntu community theme "yaru". Better than a 🌯.

item.title: rancher/docs
item.description: Documentation for Rancher products (for 2.0/new site)

item.title: DesignSystemsOSS/eccentrictouch
item.description: Suffering from Frontend crises? Here's something that might interest you. Eccentric Touch is a small CSS Library to solve all your frontend issues :)

item.title: rundocs/jekyll-rtd-theme
item.description: Just another documentation theme compatible with GitHub Pages

item.title: iuricode/portfolio
item.description: 📰 Meu portfólio criado com o objetivo de mostrar meus projetos ao longo da minha carreira.

item.title: elixirschool/elixirschool
item.description: Premier destination to learn and master the Elixir programming language

item.title: RyanFitzgerald/devportfolio
item.description: A lightweight, customizable single-page personal portfolio website template built with JavaScript and Sass

item.title: microsoft/TypeScript-Node-Starter
item.description: A reference example for TypeScript and Node with a detailed README describing how to use the two together.

item.title: samarsault/plainwhite-jekyll
item.description: A configurable portfolio-style jekyll theme for writers.

item.title: murraco/jekyll-theme-minimal-resume
item.description: Simple Jekyll theme for a minimal resume website: https://jekyll-theme-minimal-resume.netlify.com/

item.title: apache/incubator-shenyu-website
item.description: Apache ShenYu Website

item.title: thegeeklab/hugo-geekdoc
item.description: Hugo theme made for documentation
